extra.reason: Decided: parody brewery names, localStorage leaderboard behind a LeaderboardStore interface (backend swappable later), keyboard-only controls for MVP. Recorded in docs/GAME_DESIGN.md

Vite+TS+Phaser scaffold complete: Boot/Menu/Game/Results scenes, placeholder ride, LeaderboardStore over localStorage, strict tsc build passing, full loop verified in browser. Build docs added to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

Implemented and verified in browser: diagonal-scroll riding with steering/speed, road-edge and cone collisions, crash/lives/finish states; BuzzSystem with staged drift, input lag, wobble, mirrored inputs, sway, vignette, mushy response. Dev keys B/N feed Buzz until beercycle-az9 lands.
